page_metadata.biotools__summary: Aptardi (Alternative Polyadenylation Trascriptome Analysis from RNA sequencing and DNA sequencing Information) predicts polyadenylation sites in sample-specific transcriptomes using high-throughput RNA sequencing and DNA sequence.
